english: to supplement / to complement / to add to / to complete
notes: Can also be used reflexively (sich ergänzen) meaning 'to complement each other', but the primary and most common use is non-reflexive with an accusative object.

sentences.german: Kannst du bitte die fehlenden Informationen ergänzen?
sentences.english: Can you please add the missing information?

sentences.german: Er hat seinen Bericht um einige wichtige Details ergänzt.
sentences.english: He supplemented his report with some important details.

sentences.german: Die beiden Kollegen ergänzen sich sehr gut.
sentences.english: The two colleagues complement each other very well.
